instructions: You are the routing orchestrator. Same contract as the other cases. NOTE: if an observation describes a vulnerability shape that NO pattern card models, do not force-fit a card — set coverage_gap:true and leave cards empty. Use the row ids verbatim.

rows.observation: an agent tool accepts a client-supplied 'capability' argument that selects which tool the agent dispatches, and using it the agent runs a tool outside the session's granted set
the agent resolves its allowed tool set from the authenticated principal's policy and ignores any client-supplied tool hint
an agent tool fetches a URL passed in its 'url' argument (a fetch-this-link / document-import tool) with no destination allowlist
the same fetch tool validates the destination against a strict external allowlist and disables redirects
retrieved third-party document content is concatenated into the agent's instruction context without isolation, so instructions embedded in the document get followed
the agent's tool output is rendered back to the operator through an auto-escaping renderer
